name: Confederation Army
description: The ground forces of the Solomani Confederation, defending the Cause on planetary surfaces from Imperial incursion, alien aggression, and internal insurrection. Political officers are embedded in most units. Qualification: END 5+. DM-1 for every previous career. DM-2 if aged 30 or more. Commission: SOC 8+.

support.name: Support
support.description: You serve in logistics, engineering, or a political officer role embedded with front-line troops.

infantry.name: Infantry
infantry.description: You serve as front-line Solomani ground troops, fighting planetary campaigns for the Confederation.

cavalry.name: Cavalry
cavalry.description: You operate armoured vehicles and gunships in the service of the Confederation.

6.title: General
6.bonus: SOC 10 or SOC +1, whichever is higher

mishaps.1: Severely injured in action (treat as a result of 2 on the Injury Table). Alternatively, roll twice on the Injury Table and take the lower result.
mishaps.2: Your unit suffers a catastrophic defeat against Imperial or alien forces. The embedded political officer blames you for the failure. Gain them as an Enemy and you are forced out of the service.
mishaps.3: A Party political officer declares your unit's actions ideologically unsound. You are court-martialled on political grounds. If you submit to SolSec interrogation, you leave the service without a Benefit roll. If you refuse, roll END 8+ — success allows you to keep your Benefit roll.
mishaps.4: You discover your commanding officer is engaged in illegal activities or black-market dealings with Confederation contraband. You can join their ring and gain them as an Ally before the investigation ends your career, or co-operate with the military authorities — the whitewash gets you discharged but you keep your Benefit roll.
mishaps.5: You are tormented by or quarrel with a political officer or superior who questions your commitment to the Cause. Gain them as a Rival as they drive you out of the service.
mishaps.6: Injured. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected from this career.
events.3: You are deployed to a world with a hostile environment on the rimward frontier. Gain one of Vacc Suit 1, Engineer 1, Animals (riding or training) 1 or Recon 1.
events.4: Your unit is assigned to an urbanised world torn by conflict with anti-Solomani elements or resistance movements. Gain one of Stealth 1, Streetwise 1, Persuade 1 or Recon 1.
events.5: You are given a special assignment or commendation by your commanding officer. Gain DM+1 to any one Benefit roll.
events.6: You are thrown into a brutal ground war against Imperial forces or local insurgents. Roll EDU 8+ to avoid injury; if you succeed, gain one level in Gun Combat or Leadership.
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Solomani Life Events table.
events.8: You receive advanced training in a specialist field. Roll EDU 8+ to increase any one skill you already have by one level.
events.9: Surrounded and outnumbered, your unit holds the line until Confederation reinforcements arrive. Gain DM+2 to your next Advancement check.
events.10: Your unit is assigned to a peacekeeping or occupation role. Gain one of Admin 1, Investigate 1, Deception 1 or Recon 1.
events.11: You receive specialist training. Either gain one level in Heavy Weapons, Electronics or Engineer, or take DM+4 to your next Advancement roll.
events.12: Your actions in a decisive engagement bring honour to the Confederation. You are automatically promoted.
